nodes.name: Dispatch WF-2 (async)
nodes.notes: Async so retries in WF-2 (up to ~40s) never exceed the widget's 10s timeout gate. Delivery guarantee is WF-2's three paths + WF-3 alerting.

nodes.name: Respond success (silent reject)
nodes.notes: Identical body to the accept path: no oracle for attackers (G-3).
